uplink.description: Status frame (fPort 10): no leak, valve open, temperature 0
uplink._note: Upstream decodeUplink yields {leak:'N', valve:'On', temperature:0}; leak coerced to boolean false, valve to extra valveState, temperature (bytes[2]*0xff+bytes[3]) to water.temperature.current.

uplink.description: Status frame (fPort 10): no leak, valve closed, temperature 0
uplink._note: Upstream yields {leak:'N', valve:'Off', temperature:0}; bit5 clear -> valveState Off.

uplink.description: Status frame (fPort 10): leak detected, valve open, temperature reported
uplink._note: byte0=0x21 sets bit0 (leak) and bit5 (valve On); upstream yields {leak:'Y', valve:'On', temperature: 5*0xff+10 = 1285}. leak true satisfies water-leak requires water.leak.

uplink.description: Heartbeat frame (fPort 16): valve open, temperature reported, no leak field
uplink._note: fPort 16 omits the leak bit upstream; our codec correspondingly emits no water.leak. temperature = 2*0xff+8 = 518.
Upstream returns {errors:['unknown FPort']} for any fPort other than 10/16.
